copy.subject: Remember your Pre-K deadline?
copy.preview: - **Preview:** It's been 60 days. The 3+3 Bundle is still here, and Pre-K hasn't moved. Explore the 3+3 Bundle »

sections.name: Hook
sections.content: It's been two months since you signed up, and I wanted to check in, not to pressure you, but to remind you of something you already know. Pre-K starts in [X months]. And your child needs to be trained by then. I remember exactly what that timeline felt like. The countdown in your head. The knot in your stomach every time someone asks, "Is he ready for school yet?"

sections.name: Validation
sections.content: You haven't failed by waiting. In fact, taking your time was probably the smartest thing you could have done. The methods you tried, Oh Crap, sticker charts, timer sits, those aren't built for a child whose nervous system processes body signals differently. They assume the "I need to go" feeling arrives on time. For many autistic children, that signal arrives too late or not at all. That's not your fault. That's not his fault. That's neurology.

sections.name: Offer — The 3+3 Bundle
sections.content:
The 3+3 Bundle is still here. Same price, same science, same 60-day guarantee, nothing has changed except the calendar. Six pairs of Body-Signal Learning underwear, three to wear, three free. Each pair has a three-layer system designed to do what pull-ups can't: create a gentle, sustained "uh-oh" sensation that gives a developing nervous system time to register what happened. It's not a training method. It's a signal bridge, built for the brain that learns differently. 

Pricing:

| Offer | Price | Ships Free |
|-------|-------|:----------:|
| 3+3 Bundle (BESTSELLER) | $79.99 | ✅ Yes |
| 1 Pair | $34.99 | ❌ Below threshold |

One parent told me: "We bought the 3+3 bundle and the first two weeks were rough. He'd wear them for an hour then ask to take them off. I almost gave up. Then at week three, he paused mid-play, looked down, and walked to the potty. He didn't make it in time, but that pause had NEVER happened before."

sections.name: Guarantee / Risk Reversal
sections.content: 60 days to try it. By your judgment. If it doesn't work for your child, full refund. No forms to fill out. No "prove you tried." Your call, your timeline.

sections.name: CTA
sections.content:
- Button text: Explore the 3+3 Bundle
- Price anchor: That's $13.33 per pair with the bundle — less than half the single-pair price.
- Secondary link text: Learn how body-signal learning works
- Placement: After Offer section, before Lena Sign-Off, bottom-third fold position

---

Next time: What happens when you take the first step — and why the second email changes everything.

cta.price_anchor: That's $13.33 per pair with the bundle — less than half the single-pair price.

signoff.text:
With care,

Lena ——
Customer Support · Mom of two autistic sons

P.S. My older son was 8 before we figured this out. If you've stepped back from trying, I get it. When you're ready, the science will still be here. 60 days, your judgment.
